descriptionShort: NHL game clip: Rangers vs. Bruins featuring Tie Domiyan and Matt Harvey, October 1991.
descriptionLong: Game footage from an October 1991 NHL matchup between the New York Rangers and Boston Bruins. The clip features Tie Domiyan and Matt Harvey (likely a Sockeyes alumnus pursuing his pro career). This archival segment documents early 1990s professional hockey from a Richmond Sockeyes alumni perspective.
